tool.name: EnzyWizard Mut-Batch
tool.description: Run paired EnzyWizard analysis workflows for wild-type and mutant proteins

param.name: wt_input_path
param.label: Wild-type cleaned protein structure
param.help: Input wild-type cleaned protein structure file in CIF or PDB format.

param.name: mut_input_path
param.label: Mutant cleaned protein structure
param.help: Input mutant cleaned protein structure file in CIF or PDB format.

param.name: wt_msa
param.label: Wild-type MSA
param.help: Input wild-type MSA file in Stockholm, aligned FASTA, or A3M format.

param.name: mut_msa
param.label: Mutant MSA
param.help: Input mutant MSA file in Stockholm, aligned FASTA, or A3M format.

param.name: mutation
param.label: Amino acid substitution
param.help: Cleaned amino acid substitution in mutation format, e.g., A123V or A123V;G456D.

tool.help:
**EnzyWizard-Mut-Batch**
Runs paired EnzyWizard analysis workflows for a wild-type protein and its mutant. Performs the full batch workflow on both sides and integrates the results into a paired graph dataset.
**Inputs** - Wild-type and mutant cleaned protein structures (CIF or PDB). - Wild-type and mutant MSA files. - Amino acid substitution(s). - Optional substrate names.
**Outputs** - Paired integrated graph dataset comparing wild-type and mutant.
For more information, see the `enzywizard-mut-batch` documentation: https://github.com/bioinfbrad/enzywizard-mut-batch
